installConfigs.instructions: Replace <stripe-api-key> with your Stripe API key (e.g., sk_live_... or a restricted key). You can find or create API keys at https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys. The key is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.

Replace <stripe-api-key> with your Stripe API key (e.g., sk_live_... or a restricted key). You can find or create API keys at https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys. The key is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.
